title: Add within 100 using a number line
description: Practice adding numbers using a number line. Numbers used in these problems are all less than 100.
topic_path: Get ready for addition and subtraction
Add within 100 using a number line

assessment_items.question_content:
**Add.**  
*Use the number line to help you add $72 + 16$.*

$\Large{72 + 16 ={}}$ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ba0587bdb88e2307c54ed658367f2e8eeefac92b)
hints: We can think of $72 + \purpleD1\maroonD6$ as $72 +\purpleD{10}+\maroonD6$.

So, on the number line, we start at $72$ and move **right** $\purpleD{10}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4f5dbeb11f0d64fff215cf09adca151df3ccc909)

$72 + \purpleD{10} = 82$

Next, we can move **right** $\maroonD6$ more.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d50d0fe13e522952833ed225873cb1474fac98d1)

$82 + \maroonD6 = 88$
$\Large{{72} + \purpleD1\maroonD6 = 88}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Add.**  
*Use the number line to help you add $47 + 22$.*

$\Large{47 + 22 ={}}$ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f584e260427118b26ad3f39a679cebf897498204)
hints: We can think of $47 + \purpleD2\maroonD2$ as $47 +\purpleD{20}+\maroonD2$.

So, on the number line, we start at $47$ and move **right** $\purpleD{20}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/084333cf932a09a0a0cd985947a8dd3110639afd)

$47 + \purpleD{20} = 67$

Next, we can move **right** $\maroonD2$ more.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2925dddfb78f4ba96e8588edfd769331628c044e)

$47 + \maroonD2 = 49$
$\Large{{47} + \purpleD2\maroonD2 = 69}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Add.**  
*Use the number line to help you add $33 + 48$.*

$\Large{33 + 48 ={}}$ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c6e6fc0a79d6fafe0d65758182e7a1d884c50816)
hints: We can think of $33 + \purpleD4\maroonD8$ as $33 +\purpleD{40}+\maroonD8$.

So, on the number line, we start at $33$ and move **right** $\purpleD{40}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bf49838dd9b1b5b66f2cf122cd15ffc104a1507f)

$33 + \purpleD{40} = 73$

Next, we can move **right** $\maroonD8$ more.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0607d673ff4342b890e8433603f468875e198dd0)

$73+ \maroonD8 = 81$
$\Large{{33} + \purpleD4\maroonD8 = 81}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Add.**  
*Use the number line to help you add $45 + 39$.*

$\Large{45 + 39 ={}}$ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/927b132937de9fc30884f6795654ace062ce66ed)
hints: We can think of $45 + \purpleD3\maroonD9$ as $45 +\purpleD{30}+\maroonD9$.

So, on the number line, we start at $45$ and move **right** $\purpleD{30}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/487e800d693fb742196f046744daa60221db2972)

$45 + \purpleD{30} =75$

Next, we can move **right** $\maroonD9$ more.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5a3601bb2bd801160de05049b8dfe25aa7e243b5)

$75+ \maroonD9 = 84$
$\Large{{75} + \purpleD3\maroonD9 = 84}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which equation can be solved with the following number line?**

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c52b52bc2666bc6d9635d509ccfbead1d30636dd)

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
On the number line, we start at $56$ and move **right** $\purpleD{20}$, then $\maroonD8$ more.

We can represent this as  $56 +\purpleD{20}+\maroonD8$.
$56 + \purpleD{20} + \maroonD8 = 56 + \purpleD2\maroonD8$

This equation represents the number line:

$56 + 28 = 84$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which equation can be solved with the following number line?**

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/87447a3f2ef2d4a7c60fc7a11b82199ff4c14605)

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
On the number line, we start at $63$ and move **right** $\purpleD{10}$, then $\maroonD8$ more.

We can represent this as  $63 +\purpleD{10}+\maroonD8$.
$63 + \purpleD{10} + \maroonD8 = 63 + \purpleD1\maroonD8$

This equation represents the number line:

$63 +18 = 81$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which equation can be solved with the following number line?**

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4669aab0198b0c7e63729e87d12d345fd411c430)

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
On the number line, we start at $21$ and move **right** $\purpleD{70}$, then $\maroonD5$ more.

We can represent this as  $21 +\purpleD{70}+\maroonD5$.
$21 + \purpleD{70} + \maroonD5 =21 + \purpleD7\maroonD5$

This equation represents the number line:

$21 +75 = 96$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which equation can be solved with the following number line?**

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1c0fc149f4331bb7196b2bc15db1f9036a5468bb)

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
On the number line, we start at $39$ and move **right** $\purpleD{30}$, then $\maroonD9$ more.

We can represent this as  $44 +\purpleD{30}+\maroonD9$.
$44 + \purpleD{30} + \maroonD9 =44 + \purpleD3\maroonD9$

This equation represents the number line:

$44 +39 = 83$
We can think of $61 +\purpleD2\maroonD7$ as $61 +\purpleD{20}+\maroonD7$.
So on the number line, we start at $61$ and move **right** $\purpleD{20}$ and then $\maroonD7$ more.

This number line shows $61 + 27$:

![A number line starts at 61 with plus 2 and goes to 63. From 63 plus 7 goes to ?.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5528a543e572114c006ce2284b799b44365271d6)
